title: Ejucationzz
shortDescription: Ejucationzz is a directory site I created for myself using Next.js. On Ejucationzz, you can find free and paid online and offline courses available in Pakistan. 14 academies and 12 main categories, each with subcategories, have been listed.
longDescription: A comprehensive educational directory platform that helps students and professionals discover learning opportunities across Pakistan. The platform features an extensive catalog of courses from 14 different academies, organized into 12 main categories with detailed subcategories. Users can easily filter and search for both free and paid courses, whether they prefer online or offline learning formats.
